calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Default Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Saul M. Ferster, Esq. appeared with plaintiff John Wai, dba United Property Service, who was placed under oath and examined.
Maria Bucciarelli, Accounts Receivable Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Stanley L. Fugate.
Notice of Time and Placed of Trial was filed on January 22, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff John Wai, dba United Property Service, and against defendant Stanley L. Fugate as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $1,572.00.
Holdover Damages - $768.00.
Costs - $537.64.
Total - $2,877.64.

Additionally, plaintiff John Wai, dba United Property Service, is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 245 Leavenworth Street, No. 32, San Francisco, CA 94102. The rental agreement is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Saul Ferster, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff John Wai.
No appearance by Defendant: Stanley L. Fugate, matter is taken off calendar.
TRIAL DATE REMAINS.
